Title: Keyboard Navigation - BOPIS Modal
Preconditions:
- BOPIS modal accessible
- Keyboard only (no mouse)
Steps:
1. Tab to pickup option
2. Press Enter to open modal
3. Tab through all elements
4. Verify focus visible on each
5. Tab through search, list, map controls
6. Select location with Enter
7. Complete flow with keyboard only
Expected Result:
- All elements reachable via Tab
- Focus indicators visible
- Logical tab order
- Can complete entire flow

Title: Keyboard Navigation - Payment Form
Steps:
1. Tab into card number field
2. Tab through: name, expiry, CVV
3. Tab to submit button
4. Verify order
Expected Result:
- Tab order: Card → Name → Expiry → CVV
- Can enter data via keyboard
- Focus moves correctly into/out of iframes

Title: Focus Indicators - All Interactive
Steps:
1. Tab through page
2. Verify focus ring on buttons
3. Verify focus on inputs
4. Verify focus on links
5. Check custom components
Expected Result:
- Visible focus on ALL interactive elements
- High contrast focus ring
- 3:1 contrast minimum

Title: Escape Key - Modal Close
Steps:
1. Open modal
2. Press Escape key
3. Verify modal closes
4. Verify focus returns to trigger
Expected Result:
- Escape closes modal
- Focus returns appropriately
- No focus trap

Title: Focus Trap - Open Modal
Steps:
1. Tab through modal content
2. Continue tabbing past last element
3. Verify focus stays in modal
4. Shift+Tab from first element
5. Verify focus stays in modal
Expected Result:
- Focus trapped in open modal
- Cannot tab outside
- Tab cycles within modal

Title: Screen Reader - Modal Announcement
Preconditions:
- Screen reader active (NVDA/VoiceOver)
- BOPIS flow ready
Steps:
1. Activate screen reader
2. Open pickup modal
3. Listen for announcement
4. Verify modal role announced
Expected Result:
- Modal announced on open
- Title/purpose stated
- Dialog role identified

Title: Screen Reader - List Items
Preconditions:
- Screen reader active
- Location list visible
Steps:
1. Navigate to location list
2. Hear list item announcements
3. Verify count announced
4. Navigate through items
Expected Result:
- List items announced
- Position in list (1 of 5)
- Item details readable

Title: Screen Reader - Form Fields
Steps:
1. Navigate to form
2. Tab through fields
3. Verify labels announced
4. Verify required state announced
Expected Result:
- Field labels read
- Required status announced
- Error messages announced

Title: Screen Reader - Error Messages
Preconditions:
- Screen reader active
- Form with validation
Steps:
1. Submit form with errors
2. Verify error announced
3. Navigate to error field
4. Hear specific error
Expected Result:
- Errors announced immediately
- Can navigate to errors
- Clear error text

Title: Screen Reader - Buttons
Steps:
1. Navigate to buttons
2. Hear button text
3. Verify role announced
Expected Result:
- Button text announced
- 'button' role stated
- Action clear

Title: ARIA Labels - Custom Controls
Steps:
1. Inspect custom controls
2. Check for aria-label
3. Check for aria-labelledby
4. Verify meaningful labels
Expected Result:
- ARIA labels present
- Labels are descriptive
- No generic 'button' labels

Title: ARIA Roles - Modal Dialog
Steps:
1. Inspect modal container
2. Check role='dialog'
3. Check aria-modal='true'
4. Check aria-labelledby
Expected Result:
- Dialog role set
- Modal attribute correct
- Linked to title

Title: ARIA Live Regions
Steps:
1. Trigger content update
2. Check for aria-live
3. Verify announcement
Expected Result:
- Live regions announce updates
- Appropriate politeness level
- Not too verbose

Title: axe DevTools Scan - Critical
Steps:
1. Navigate to target page
2. Open axe DevTools
3. Run scan
4. Check Critical issues
5. Document findings
Expected Result:
- Zero critical violations
- All critical issues resolved
- No barriers to access

Title: axe DevTools Scan - Serious
Steps:
1. Run axe scan
2. Check Serious issues
3. Prioritize fixes
Expected Result:
- Serious issues documented
- Plan for remediation
- Acceptable count

Title: Color Contrast - Text
Steps:
1. Check body text contrast
2. Check heading contrast
3. Check link contrast
4. Minimum 4.5:1 for normal text
5. Minimum 3:1 for large text
Expected Result:
- Normal text: 4.5:1 minimum
- Large text (18px+): 3:1 minimum
- All text readable

Title: Color Contrast - UI Components
Steps:
1. Check button contrast
2. Check input borders
3. Check focus indicators
4. Minimum 3:1 for UI
Expected Result:
- UI components: 3:1 minimum
- Focus visible
- Interactive states clear

Title: Color Not Sole Indicator
Preconditions:
- Error states visible
- Status indicators visible
Steps:
1. Check error indicators
2. Verify not color-only
3. Check success/warning states
4. Verify icon or text accompanies
Expected Result:
- Errors have icon + color
- Status not color-only
- Accessible to colorblind

Title: Images - Alt Text
Steps:
1. Inspect product images
2. Check alt attributes
3. Verify meaningful descriptions
4. Check decorative images (alt='')
Expected Result:
- Product images have descriptive alt
- Decorative images have empty alt
- No missing alt attributes

Title: Form Labels - Input Association
Steps:
1. Inspect input elements
2. Check for associated labels
3. Verify for='id' matching
4. Test screen reader
Expected Result:
- All inputs have labels
- Labels properly associated
- Screen reader announces

Title: Error Identification
Steps:
1. Submit with errors
2. Check error identification
3. Verify field association
4. Check error suggestions
Expected Result:
- Errors clearly identified
- Linked to fields
- Suggestions provided

Title: Touch Target Size
Steps:
1. Check button sizes
2. Verify minimum 44x44px
3. Check spacing between targets
Expected Result:
- Minimum 44x44px touch targets
- Adequate spacing
- Easy to tap accurately

Title: VcVariantPicker - States
Steps:
1. Check default state
2. Check hover state
3. Check focus state
4. Check selected state
Expected Result:
- All states distinguishable
- Visual + programmatic indication
- Screen reader announces
